name: 250g Bag of Whole Bean Coffee
description:
If you're looking for a small bag of whole bean coffee to jump into the world of flavours offered by Cafree, you're in the right place: this smaller, 250g bag of whole bean coffee is perfect for a first-time buyer or as a little top-up.

Our coffee is ethically sourced from sustainable farms around the world before it's roasted by us, right here in the UK. This makes sure the coffee is at its optimum freshness by the time it reaches your door, so you can be certain you're drinking it at its best.

Be spoiled for choice when choosing between fourteen special blends, ranging from our own chocolatey signature House Blend to our bittersweet Dark Blend and even our smoky French and Italian Roast Blends. We have a blend for every occasion: fancy a mocha, espresso or even pumpkin spice brew? We've got you covered.

Our in-house master roasters work tirelessly to ensure each bean tastes exactly how it should. When you open a bag of our speciality-grade coffee you know you're getting something capable of a café-worthy brew, every time. And when you're done, don't worry about waste - the bag itself is made from 100% recyclable material.

We will never charge over the odds for our coffee - you're always getting the best prices available when you shop with us. Be sure to check out all our blends to see if your favourites are reduced in price or have subscription discounts to make the most of our offerings and get the best deals.

name: Cold Brew Concentrate - 10 Servings
description:
Make delicious coffee in seconds when you pick up 10 servings of our Cold Brew Concentrate. If you want exceptional flavour with little-to-no effort, this product is for you.

To make our concentrate, we slow-steep our speciality-grade coffee in cold water for hours to extract all those gorgeous natural flavours from our ethically sourced beans. The result is a silky smooth, barista-quality base for all your coffee needs - not just iced coffees but hot lattes too, made in seconds. Mix in milk or water in a 1:1 ratio with the concentrate for a perfect coffee.

Be spoiled for choice when choosing between four special blends, ranging from our own chocolatey signature House Blend to our bittersweet Dark Blend: we've got you covered. When you're done, don't worry about waste - the carton itself is made from 100% recyclable material.

Each 300ml carton is capable of producing up to 5 delicious coffees, and you're getting two of them in this pack.

name: 100g Bag of Loose Leaf Tea
description:
This 100g bag of loose leaf tea is ideal for first-time buyers looking to explore the variety of incredible flavours on offer by Cafree, gifting, or simply topping up your favourite blend.

Our teas are ethically sourced from trusted growers around the world and are carefully selected for quality, flavour, and sustainability. Each blend is thoughtfully prepared to ensure it delivers a clean, balanced cup, full of character from the very first brew to the last.

With ten distinctive blends to choose from, there’s something for every taste and moment. Whether you prefer something light and refreshing, rich and comforting, or naturally aromatic, our range has you covered: perfect for slow mornings, afternoon breaks, or winding down in the evening.

Our in-house team takes great care in crafting each blend, making sure every leaf contributes exactly what it should. When you open a bag of our loose leaf tea, you can be confident you’re brewing something special: the kind of tea that feels just as at home in your favourite mug as it does in a café teapot. And when you're done, don't worry about waste - the bag itself is made from 100% recyclable material.

This 100g bag of loose leaf tea can make up to 50 delicious, aromatic cups.

We believe great tea should be fairly priced. That’s why we never charge over the odds, and regularly offer discounts and subscriptions to help you enjoy your favourites for less. Be sure to explore all our blends to find the perfect match for your taste, and at the best value.

name: 25g Tub of Matcha Powder
description:
Love matcha? Don't look anywhere else. This 25g tub of matcha powder is the real deal, at a great price.

Our matcha powder is made using speciality-grade green tea sourced directly from Japan; it is hand-picked by master growers and stone-ground to a smooth texture in order to exhibit a gorgeous tasting tea that is full of vibrant flavour. The process is undertaken with care and expertise in order to retain all the vitamins and antioxidants present in green tea; this allows that beautiful green colour to show through in the final result. Don't sleep on the versatility of matcha: you can of course use it to make the most amazing tea, but also try it in smoothies, shakes and lattes to unlock its full potential.

This 25g tub is capable of producing up to 25 delicious cups of matcha.

name: Cans of Iced Tea -  Pack of 4
description:
If you’re looking for a refreshing twist on tea with zero fuss, our pack of 4 cans of iced tea is the perfect place to start. Designed for easy enjoyment wherever you are, these ready-to-drink teas deliver bold, fruit-led flavour with all the lightness and refreshment you expect from a great iced brew.

Our teas are ethically sourced from trusted growers around the world and are carefully selected for quality, flavour, and sustainability. Our iced teas are made with a combination of those tea leaves alongside real fruit flavours, blended to create clean, vibrant drinks that are never overpowering or overly sweet. Each can is crafted to be crisp, balanced, and genuinely refreshing: ideal for warm days, busy afternoons, or whenever you want something cold and satisfying.

With ten bright flavours to explore, there’s plenty to keep things interesting. From the juicy sweetness of Peach to the citrus lift of Blood Orange and the delicate floral notes of Elderflower & Apple, our range is all about fresh, modern flavours, and there's almost certainly a flavour for you.

Our in-house team takes great care in crafting each flavour, making sure every batch is carefully prepared to ensure consistency and quality in every sip: when you open a can, you can expect a smooth, refreshing iced tea. And when you're done, don't worry about waste - both the cans and the box they arrive in are made from 100% recyclable material.

We believe great iced tea should be fairly priced. That’s why we never charge over the odds, and regularly offer discounts and subscriptions to help you enjoy your favourites for less. Be sure to explore all our blends to find the perfect match for your taste, and at the best value.

name: Small Cafetière
description:
This French Press (known colloquially as a Cafetière) is the perfect way to extract the most from the delicious coffee roasted by us at Cafree.

This polished stainless steel cafetière has a modern and minimal design, meaning it can easily be tucked away in the cupboard out of sight when not in use, or left out on your kitchen countertop if you feel it fits your aesthetic.

With a 600ml capacity, our smaller cafetière is capable of holding enough coffee for 2-3 standard mugs. The stainless steel surround ensures your coffee retains its temperature, so you can come back later for your next cup without worrying about it being cold. The design also allows for swift and efficient dismantling for easy cleaning, and it is dishwasher safe.

Use exclusively coarsely-ground coffee, stir it with hot water and let it brew before pressing - this will result in the best extraction of flavour from the grind, producing the best coffee.
